items.title: Bitcoin likely to fall another 30% to $44,000 by year-end, prominent BTC miner says
items.description: An early miner says Strategy's stock mNAV has fallen to 0.72, near the level that marked the last cycle's turn, and that bitcoin historically bottoms about six months after that signal.

items.title: Kraken sues crypto derivatives firm PowerTrade over 'misappropriated' funds claim
items.description: PowerTrade changed Kraken’s positive balance of around $7 million to a $2 million deficit via a series of unauthorized “corrections” related to trades that had expired or settled months earlier, according to a legal filing.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE gains 10.1% as index rises
items.description: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 5.8% from Wednesday, joined Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

items.title: Uniswap, Spark aim to build stablecoin FX market as banks, fintechs enter the industry
items.description: The protocols are building shared liquidity and trading infrastructure for a future with hundreds of competing digital currencies on blockchain rails.

items.title: Post-prison CZ says time behind bars didn't hurt the billionaire's business after Binance
items.description: The pardoned ex-CEO called prison a character-building "plus" as he's pursued a venture-capital career, despite his majority stake in the world's biggest crypto exchange.

items.title: Circle and Nomura join forces to target a $440 billion daily foreign exchange market in Japan
items.description: The stablecoin giant and the Japanese financial corporation plan to deploy cross-border foreign exchange settlements as early as next year.

items.title: Bitcoin derivatives signal panic. A weak core PCE reading could trigger snapback.
items.description: Your day-ahead look for June 25, 2026

items.title: CoinEx denies claims it served as $3.84 billion gateway to sanctioned Iranian crypto firms
items.description: Blockchain analysts TRM Labs says CoinEx facilitated more than $3.8 billion in blockchain-traced flows with sanctioned Iranian crypto entities. CoinEx disputes the findings.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
items.description: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.

items.title: About 60% of World Cup bettors on Polymarket are first-time crypto users
items.description: Polymarket emerged as an onboarding layer for about 60% of World Cup bettors, who interacted with the blockchain for the first time during their prediction market entry.

items.title: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
items.description: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

items.title: Binance faces EU service limits next week as MiCA rules take effect
items.description: Binance will limit EU onboarding and services from July 1 under MiCA rules after failing to gain authorization from a member state, while withdrawals remain available for users.

items.title: Circle, Nomura eye Japan corporate FX with stablecoin settlement: Report
items.description: Circle and Nomura are reportedly partnering to enable stablecoin-based foreign exchange settlement for Japanese companies as the country's regulated blockchain-based financial infrastructure expands.

items.title: Iran-linked entities moved $3.8B through CoinEx, TRM says
items.description: TRM Labs traced $3.8 billion moved by 60 sanctioned Iranian entities through CoinEx and said that the exchange’s 8% share of illicit transactions was substantially higher than its counterparts.

items.title: Indonesia sets certification rules for influencers recommending crypto
items.description: Indonesia’s financial regulator will require influencers recommending crypto and other digital assets to hold relevant certifications as regulators worldwide tighten oversight of finfluencers.

items.title: Core inflation rate hit 3.4% in May, highest since October 2023, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
items.description: The personal consumption expenditures price index was expected to show a 4.1% annual increase.

items.title: Apple stock drops 5% on MacBook and iPad price hikes due to memory crunch
items.description: Tim Cook said last week that Apple would hike prices due to surging memory and storage costs.

items.title: JPMorgan names Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh co-presidents as longtime exec Marianne Lake exits
items.description: The moves would appear to make Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh the most obvious possible successors to JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon.

items.title: Micron is up 10% after blockbuster earnings, but has pulled back from highs
items.description: The company's revenue more than quadrupled from $9.3 billion a year earlier to $41.46 billion, it reported on Wednesday

items.title: Wendy's turns lower as meme rally fails to extend to a second day
items.description: The stock's volatile run appeared largely disconnected from company fundamentals and instead reflected a burst of social media enthusiasm.

items.title: Chevron says no quick fix for gas prices as Trump takes on Big Oil: ‘It’s going to take time’
items.description: Her comments come shortly after President Donald Trump ordered an investigation into Big Oil, accusing them of "gouging" consumers.

items.title: GameStop’s CEO just sacrificed a $35 billion pay package. Here’s how it could impact his effort to buy eBay
items.description: Ryan Cohen has shared few details on how he'll move forward with his $56 billion offer for eBay since the company rejected the proposal in May.

items.title: The world’s top-performing stock market still isn’t a developed market. Here’s why, according to the MSCI chief
items.description: MSCI CEO Henry Fernandez said South Korea's stock market still falls short of developed market standards.

items.transcript_reason:
Could not retrieve a transcript for the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OSVv6F6cVZA! This is most likely caused by:

YouTube is blocking requests from your IP. This usually is due to one of the following reasons:
- You have done too many requests and your IP has been blocked by YouTube
- You are doing requests from an IP belonging to a cloud provider (like AWS, Google Cloud Platform, Azure, etc.). Unfortunately, most IPs from cloud providers are blocked by YouTube.

Ways to work around this are explained in the "Working around IP bans" section of the README (https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api?tab=readme-ov-file#working-around-ip-bans-requestblocked-or-ipblocked-exception).


If you are sure that the described cause is not responsible for this error and that a transcript should be retrievable, please create an issue at https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api/issues. Please add which version of youtube_transcript_api you are using and provide the information needed to replicate the error. Also make sure that there are no open issues which already describe your problem!

items.title: SpaceX stock is a terrible buy — what that actually means for the bull market
items.description: Overhyped IPOs rarely make you money in the short term. That doesn’t mean it’s time to sell your stocks..

items.title: Micron has suddenly become one of the world’s most important stocks
items.description: “It is hard to overstate how significant last night’s earnings were,” a Mizuho managing director said.

items.title: Apple’s MacBooks and iPads are getting more expensive as the memory crunch deepens
items.description: Apple increased prices on select MacBooks and iPads Thursday morning on the heels of a blowout Micron earnings report.

items.title: My son passed away. Am I crazy to move to my former home and sell a house I bought in September?
items.description: “I raised my children there as a single mother, and it was the last home my son lived in before he passed away unexpectedly.”

items.title: A $600,000 Ferrari? How healthcare scam artists are laughing at the rest of us.
items.description: Ordinary people are trying to make the rent, and fraudsters are ripping off Medicare, Medicaid and private insurance.

items.title: Consumer spending rises again — and now cheaper gas is on the way
items.description: Americans have been spending more, but mostly because of rising inflation.

items.title: ‘I’m scared of making a huge financial mistake’: I gave my brother half of my $1.5 million home. Can he force me to sell?
items.description: “One lawyer estimated that my brother and I would each walk away with a couple hundred thousand dollars.”

items.title: Rocket Lab, Lockheed Martin among the partners in SpaceX’s military space-laser project
items.description: Government documents show a lineup of defense contractors joining SpaceX to create a satellite network to track airborne threats.

Ways to work around this are explained in the "Working around IP bans" section of the README (https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api?tab=readme-ov-file#working-around-ip-bans-requestblocked-or-ipblocked-exception).


If you are sure that the described cause is not responsible for this error and that a transcript should be retrievable, please create an issue at https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api/issues. Please add which version of youtube_transcript_api you are using and provide the information needed to replicate the error. Also make sure that there are no open issues which already describe your problem!
